steps.name: Left to right
actions: cue "Switch: left elbow toward the right knee"

steps.name: Left down
actions: cue "Back to the floor: keep a light, quick rhythm"

steps.name: Gallop close
actions: cue "Chase the trailing foot to the lead: feet meet in the air"

steps.name: Open
actions: cue "Reach the arms back and lift the chest: open the front line"

steps.name: Switch
actions: cue "Return and switch: left arm and right leg reach out"

steps.name: Lower
actions: cue "Push the hips back and hinge with a flat back: let the arms hang to the bar"

steps.name: Plié
actions: cue "Turn out from the hips and bend the knees over the toes: heels down"

header: posecode stretch "Elbow flexion & forearm rotation (ROM demo)"

steps.name: Flex & supinate
actions: cue "Bend the elbows and turn the palms up: flexion with supination"

steps.name: Extend & pronate
actions: cue "Straighten and turn the palms down: extension with pronation"

steps.name: Letter A
actions: cue "A: fingers curled into a fist, thumb resting alongside"

steps.name: Letter B
actions: cue "B: fingers straight and together, thumb across the palm"

steps.name: Letter I
actions: cue "I: only the little finger stands up"

steps.name: Extend
actions: cue "Snap the lower leg out: strike with the ball of the foot"

steps.name: Wave in
actions: cue "...and back again: a friendly wave"

steps.name: Lift
actions: cue "Raise the straight right leg forward: sagittal-plane hip flexion"

steps.name: Sink
actions: cue "Sink into a wide, low stance: thighs working, back tall, guard up"

steps.name: Flex
actions: cue "Bend the right knee, heel toward the glutes: the knee's single plane"

steps.name: Switch
actions: cue "Switch fast: left knee drives in"

steps.name: Brace
actions: cue "Brace the core: one straight line from head to heels"

steps.name: First position
actions: cue "Arms rounded low in front: first position, shoulders soft"

steps.name: Second position
actions: cue "Open the arms out to the sides: second position, wrists lifted"

steps.name: Fifth en haut
actions: cue "Float the arms into a rounded frame overhead: fifth position"

steps.name: Slouch
actions: cue "The collapsed desk posture: rounded back, head drifting forward"

steps.name: Rise
actions: cue "Turn out and rise onto the balls of the feet: lengthen up tall"

steps.name: Abduct
actions: cue "Arms sweep out and up to the sides: frontal-plane abduction"

steps.name: Rotate right
actions: cue "Rotate the trunk to the right: transverse-plane spinal rotation"

steps.name: Step right
actions: cue "Walk forward: right foot leads, opposite arm swings through"

steps.name: Step left
actions: cue "Left foot leads, arms swap: keep travelling forward"
